name: Braised Steak and Green Pepper
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Lean steak, cut into 1/4 inch strips
1 large Green pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the steak strips in flour mixed with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a large frying pan.
3. Brown the meat on all sides, then drain off any excess fat.
4. Add broth, tomato juice (reserving tomato pieces for later), onion, and garlic to the meat.
5. Cover and simmer about 1 hour until the meat is tender.
6. Add reserved tomato pieces, green pepper strips, and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Stir-cook for an additional 4 to 5 minutes.
Good served with rice. Tested by Alice Rodier March 94.
